summary: Testing completed for Daily Fitness Score feature in DesiFit mobile app. All 8 test cases passed. Features verified: onboarding flow, dashboard with fitness score display, circular progress indicator, score breakdown categories (Calories=40pts, Exercise=30pts, Habits=20pts, Bonus=10pts), motivational hints, Progress tab navigation, Weekly Fitness Score card with 7-Day Average.
seed_data_creation: None - app uses AsyncStorage for local data persistence
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Fitness Score feature fully tested. Test covers onboarding, dashboard display, circular progress indicator, 4-category score breakdown, motivational hints, and Weekly Fitness Score on Progress tab. App is Expo/React Native with AsyncStorage for local data. All features working correctly.

features_tested.details: Score calculation with Calories=40pts, Exercise=30pts, Habits=20pts, Bonus=10pts working correctly
SVG-based circular progress displaying score out of 100
All 4 categories (Calories, Exercise, Habits, Bonus) displayed with correct point values

features_tested.feature: Weekly average fitness score on Progress
features_tested.details: 7-Day Average displayed with data count on Progress screen
Scores persist between sessions (verified via day count)

features_tested.feature: Score color changes based on value
features_tested.details: Color logic implemented: green>=80, amber>=60, orange>=40, red<40
